step_rationale: Short-chain-fatty-acid and ketone receptor; systemic blood-pressure and inflammation regulation independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: GPR41 activation by short-chain fatty acids and ketone bodies mediates blood-pressure control and inflammation resolution in MI.

references.title: The role of ketone bodies in oxidized LDL-induced cell proliferation and lipid accumulation of macrophages.
Microbial Peer Pressure: The Role of the Gut Microbiota in Hypertension and Its Complications.
